data.title: Is Tesla Bringing Back Its Media Team? New Job Listing Suggests So, Years After Elon Musk Said Other Companies Spend Money On 'Manipulating Public Opinion'
data.description: Tesla is looking to hire a vehicle communications manager at its factory in Fremont, California, in a possible move towards restoring a media team.

Chinese Social Media Company Hello Group Gains After Q3 Print, CEO Flags Overseas Growth
data.description: Hello Group Inc reported a 12.1% decline in Q3 net revenue to $381.14M, beating analyst estimate. Momo app's paying users and MAU decreased.
